dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: It's been a week since I moved here.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Pizza.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I don't feel too well because I've been eating fast-food all week, but that didn't really matter.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: It's not like I wanted to live long.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [KINGSHIT] I'LL COME BACK AFTER TAKING SHIT. [GONG] EVERYONE HERE IS ALL ADDICTED. [POTATO] BUY 1200 GOLD. ANY GOOD OFFER?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Hmm.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Hasn't this guy been sitting there for five days?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Level 78. Is this lady? And she's been standing still since last week.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Did they get a stroke while playing this video game?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: She moved a little bit.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Keyboard macro to not get kicked off?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Huh??

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [SHOUT][POTATO] BUYING 1200 GOLD, MSG ME PLZ. [PUBLIC][GAYDREE] GUYS, I'VE BEEN HEARING VOICES IN MY HEAD AND BEEN NOSEBLEEDING EVERYDAY. SHOULD I GO SEE A DOCTOR? CAN IT BE A TUMOR?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [SHOUT][POTATO] BUYING 1200 GOLD, MSG ME PLZ. [PUBLIC][GAYDREE] GUYS, I'VE BEEN HEARING VOICES IN MY HEAD AND BEEN NOSEBLEEDING EVERYDAY. SHOULD I GO SEE A DOCTOR? CAN IT BE A TUMOR? [SHOUT][POTATO] BUYING 1200 GOLD, MSG ME PLZ. [PUBLIC][GAYDREE] THE VOICE KEEPS TELLING ME TO KILL MOM AND POPS. IT KEEPS RINGING IN MY EARS. IT'S DRIVING ME CRAZY.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: IT'S DRIVING ME CRAZY. [SHOUT][POTATO] BUYING 1200 GOLD, MSG ME PLZ. [SHOUT][RZAVCF] SELLING ARTISAN ARMOR DESIGN FOR 200 GOLD. [SHOUT][BASTARD] RECRUITING TANKERS TO RAID DUNGEONS OF LOST ISLAND ARTIFACTS. [PUBLIC][GAYDREE] ANSWER ME, YOU F***ING NUTS! I THINK I CAN KILL MY PARENTS ASLEEP IN THEIR BEDROOM IF I RAID ON THEM WITH A KITCHEN KNIFE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: BEDROOM IF I RAID ON THEM WITH A KITCHEN KNIFE. [SHOUT][SABEL] STFU, YOU ATTENTION WHORE. GET SOME NEW EQUIPMENT OR GO DO AN INSTANCE. [SHOUT][ZZPTD] MY CONDOLENCES FOR HIS PARENTS FOR RAISING SUCH F***TARD.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [SHOUT][ZZPTD] MY CONDOLENCES FOR HIS PARENTS FOR RAISING SUCH F***TARD. [PUBLIC][GAYDREE] I'LL KILL YOU! [SHOUT][TASTYCRAB] IS HE TRYING TO TYPE WITH HIS D***? WHAT A DUMBASS, LOL.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: WHAT A DUMBASS, LOL. [PUBLIC][GAYDREE] ASDFJKPQKJFPQVKQJDQQQQ QJQPNPPPPPPPPPPPPPPQOIVQVQLLLLI LLLLLLLLL LLLLLLL LLLLLLE LLLLLLL LLLLLLE LLLLLLE LLLLLLLLLE LLLLLLLLLLLL LLLLLLLLLLLLLE LLLLLLLLLLLLLL LLLLLLLLLLLLLLE LLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLI LLLLLLE LLLLLLLLLLLLLLLL

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [SHOUT][PONGPONG] STOP FLOODING THE CHAT, YOU PSYCHO. [SHOUT][ZODOLLARCHICKEN] MAYBE IT'S A CAT. [SHOUT][IMLOOKINGFORLOVERIMSERIOUS] OH, THE ENDLESS POSSIBILITIES OF DISCOVERING NEW IDIOTS EVERYDAY IN THIS VAST UNIVERSE. [SHOUT][UOLKING] WHAT A MENTAL CASE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: F***ing losers.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: No.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Seriously?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I can't stand this shit anymore.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Great.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: There's no one at the office.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: What the... why did they lock this door?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Well, f*** it then.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Your fault for locking the roof.

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: Excuse me, this is a non-smoking building.

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: I was wondering who's been leaving their cigarette butts everyday.

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: And it was you, Mr. Mobster.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Me?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Everyday? I've never smoked inside before--

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: And wait a minute, I'm not a thug?

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: Then what are you?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Hmm, a goodfella?

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: So lame.

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: Okay, Mr. Mobster. If you want to smoke, please smoke on the roof.

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: They even put an ashtray there for you.

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: Just take three more steps!

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: The entire corridor below smells like your cigarette!

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Hey, brat! Don't you see that cage door is locked?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Can't go up, even if I wanted to!

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: Huh? Really?

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: Why did they lock that door?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: How should I know?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: By the way, what are you doing up here?

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: Eh, you.

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: Wait a minute.

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: You underage brat! Who are you to preach about smoking?

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: How old are you, huh?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Mind your own business!

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: I'm telling your brother!

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: Pardon me, good sir: may I offer you a burger?

dialogue.speaker: MOBSTER
dialogue.line: Too late, kid.

dialogue.speaker: MOBSTER
dialogue.line: By the way, I'll have to ask the security guard to unlock this door.

dialogue.speaker: OLD LADY
dialogue.line: Not today. No one is at the security office today.

dialogue.speaker: MOBSTER
dialogue.line: Yeah?

dialogue.speaker: MOBSTER
dialogue.line: What's up with that old man?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN'S MOTHER
dialogue.line: What the hell did you just say?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN'S MOTHER
dialogue.line: Settlement??

dialogue.speaker: HYUN'S MOTHER
dialogue.line: Who... who did this to my son?!

dialogue.speaker: HYUN'S MOTHER
dialogue.line: You pathetic fool!

dialogue.speaker: HYUN'S MOTHER
dialogue.line: Get him here right now!

dialogue.speaker: HYUN'S FATHER
dialogue.line: What did you expect?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN'S FATHER
dialogue.line: No one will protect you!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A dream again?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: What time is it now?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MESSAGE: NUMBER UNKNOWN. YOUR PACKAGE WAS LEFT BY THE DOOR. SINCE NO ONE ANSWERED, THE SECURITY OFFICE IS EMPTY TOO.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Oh, that must be ramen.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: What the?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Just perfect.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Are these nosebleeds?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: No. Seems too much to be nosebleeds.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: What in the world--?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Why is she eating my ramen?!

dialogue.speaker: MONSTER
dialogue.line: Something to eat...

summary: Hyun reflects on his isolated life and observes disturbing online game chat. He then has an encounter with an old lady about smoking and a locked roof door, followed by a flashback of his parents arguing. Later, he discovers a monster in his apartment eating his ramen.
